what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment linked to a design-source channel item, identifying the target image URI, attachment type, and addition timestamp.
observations: YAML-frontmatter metadata file with no body content
standouts: Target URI points to a pitch image in the design-source channel's recent-pitches collection
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
notes: A lightweight ledger entry that links a design-source channel item to a specific image asset.
questions: Which exact design-source message or pitch references this attachment?
Is the image:// URI resolvable and versioned?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as an image attachment record matches the content exactly.
intention_signals: To create a durable, referenceable record associating a design-source communication with a specific pitch image.
contribution: Provides a stable attachment identifier and target URI that a fused system can use to locate the referenced image asset.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file linking the design-source channel to image asset image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-20.
intention_for_embedding: To record that an image attachment was added to a design-source channel message at a specific time.
